result.stdout:
Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console (aieval) version 10.4.0

---------
Telemetry
---------
The aieval .NET tool collects usage data in order to help us improve your experience. The data is anonymous and doesn't include personal information. You can opt-out of this data collection by setting the DOTNET_AIEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1' or 'true' using your favorite shell.

Description:
  Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console (aieval) version 10.4.0

Usage:
  Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  report         Generate a report from a result store
  clean-results  Delete results
  clean-cache    Delete expired cache entries

The aieval .NET tool collects usage data in order to help us improve your experience. The data is anonymous and doesn't include personal information. You can opt-out of this data collection by setting the DOTNET_AIEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1' or 'true' using your favorite shell.

result.stdout:
Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console (aieval) version 10.4.0

Description:
  Delete expired cache entries

Usage:
  Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console clean-cache [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>      Root path under which the cache and results are stored
  --endpoint <endpoint>  Endpoint URL under which the cache and results are stored for Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console (aieval) version 10.4.0

Description:
  Delete results

Usage:
  Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console clean-results [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>      Root path under which the cache and results are stored
  --endpoint <endpoint>  Endpoint URL under which the cache and results are stored for Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage
  -n <n>                 Number of most recent executions to preserve. [default: 0]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console (aieval) version 10.4.0

Description:
  Generate a report from a result store

Usage:
  Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console report [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                 Root path under which the cache and results are stored
  --endpoint <endpoint>             Endpoint URL under which the cache and results are stored for Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage
  --open                            Open the report in the default browser [default: False]
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Output filename/path
  -n <n>                            Number of most recent executions to include in the report. [default: 10]
  -f, --format <html|json>          Specify the format for the generated report. [default: html]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console (aieval) version 10.4.0

Description:
  Generate a report from a result store

Usage:
  Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation.Console report [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                 Root path under which the cache and results are stored
  --endpoint <endpoint>             Endpoint URL under which the cache and results are stored for Azure Data Lake Gen2 storage
  --open                            Open the report in the default browser [default: False]
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Output filename/path
  -n <n>                            Number of most recent executions to include in the report. [default: 10]
  -f, --format <html|json>          Specify the format for the generated report. [default: html]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
